title: Rxperiments
text: This site documents my experiments and learning journey with various pharmaverse packages for clinical data analysis in R.

title: Rxperiments
text: This site documents my experiments and learning journey with various pharmaverse packages for clinical data analysis in R.

title: Rxperiments
text:
Packages Covered

gtsummary
A package for creating publication-ready analytical and summary tables. Perfect for demographics tables, regression summaries, and more.


crane
Tools for clinical reporting and analysis.


Other Pharmaverse Packages

admiral - ADaM dataset creation
rtables - Complex table layouts for regulatory submissions

title: Rxperiments
text:
About This Site
This is a personal learning resource. Code examples are experimental and may not represent best practices.

title: Rxperiments
text:
Resources

Pharmaverse
gtsummary documentation
CDISC Standards

title: Summary Tables with gtsummary
text:
Code
library(gtsummary)

# Demographics table example
trial %>%
  tbl_summary(
    include = c(age, grade, stage),
    by = trt,
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
    )
  ) %>%
  add_overall() %>%
  add_p() %>%
  bold_labels()

title: Summary Tables with gtsummary
text:
Code
library(gtsummary)

# Demographics table example
trial %>%
  tbl_summary(
    include = c(age, grade, stage),
    by = trt,
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
    )
  ) %>%
  add_overall() %>%
  add_p() %>%
  bold_labels()

title: Summary Tables with gtsummary
text:
Regression Tables


Code
# Logistic regression summary
glm(response ~ age + grade, data = trial, family = binomial) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE)

title: admiral - ADaM Dataset Creation
text: admiral (ADaM in R Asset Library) is a pharmaverse package for creating ADaM datasets in R.

title: admiral - ADaM Dataset Creation
text: admiral (ADaM in R Asset Library) is a pharmaverse package for creating ADaM datasets in R.

title: admiral - ADaM Dataset Creation

Code

title: rtables - Complex Table Layouts
text: rtables provides a framework for creating complex tables for regulatory submissions.

title: rtables - Complex Table Layouts
text: rtables provides a framework for creating complex tables for regulatory submissions.

title: rtables - Complex Table Layouts
text:
Installation


Code
install.packages("rtables")

title: rtables - Complex Table Layouts
text:
Basic Example


Code
library(rtables)

# Basic table layout
lyt <- basic_table() %>%
  split_cols_by("ARM") %>%
  analyze("AGE", afun = mean)

# Build the table
# build_table(lyt, data = adsl)

title: Getting Started with gtsummary
text: gtsummary creates publication-ready analytical and summary tables in R.

title: Getting Started with gtsummary
text: gtsummary creates publication-ready analytical and summary tables in R.

title: Getting Started with gtsummary
text:
Installation


Code
install.packages("gtsummary")

title: Getting Started with gtsummary
text:
Basic Example


Code
library(gtsummary)

# Create a summary table
trial %>%
  tbl_summary(
    include = c(age, grade, response),
    by = trt
  ) %>%
  add_p()
